caption: In a room with wood-paneled walls, a man stands behind a podium addressing a seated audience. He is wearing a white shirt, a dark vest, and glasses. To his left, another person is seated at a table, though their face is partially obscured. The audience consists of several people viewed from behind, including a person in a maroon shirt, others in patterned sweaters, and a person in a yellow shirt. Some audience members are wearing plaid shirts. A white text overlay reading "ORCA" appears on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man at the podium remains in a similar position, gesturing slightly with his hands as he speaks. The audience members remain seated and attentive, with very little movement between the frames, maintaining a static composition as the presentation continues.
